channel.title: Draft: Context-Driven Development
channel.description: Learn how to add structure, quality gates, and methodology to AI-assisted software development. Based on the Draft book -- a comprehensive guide to Context-Driven Development.
channel.itunes:author: Mayur Pise
channel.itunes:summary: Learn how to add structure, quality gates, and methodology to AI-assisted software development. Based on the Draft book -- a comprehensive guide to Context-Driven Development.

item.title: Chapter 0: What is Draft?
item.description: What Draft is, what it is not, who it is for, and what you get. An overview of 28 commands and 7 specialized agents for structured AI development.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 0: What is Draft?
item.itunes:summary: What Draft is, what it is not, who it is for, and what you get. An overview of 28 commands and 7 specialized agents for structured AI development.

item.title: Chapter 1: The Problem
item.description: Why AI coding assistants produce wrong code without structure. Explores the gap between speed and correctness, and why better prompting is not the answer.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 1: The Problem
item.itunes:summary: Why AI coding assistants produce wrong code without structure. Explores the gap between speed and correctness, and why better prompting is not the answer.

item.title: Chapter 3: Getting Started
item.description: Install Draft and run your first commands in five minutes. Set up architecture discovery, create a track, and start implementing with structured AI assistance.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 3: Getting Started
item.itunes:summary: Install Draft and run your first commands in five minutes. Set up architecture discovery, create a track, and start implementing with structured AI assistance.

item.title: Chapter 4: Specs and Plans
item.description: Collaborative spec intake and phased plan generation. Requirements to specification to implementation plan, reviewed before code exists.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 4: Specs and Plans
item.itunes:summary: Collaborative spec intake and phased plan generation. Requirements to specification to implementation plan, reviewed before code exists.

item.title: Chapter 5: Implementation
item.description: Task-by-task implementation with TDD enforcement. RED, GREEN, REFACTOR cycles with architecture checkpoints and production robustness patterns.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 5: Implementation
item.itunes:summary: Task-by-task implementation with TDD enforcement. RED, GREEN, REFACTOR cycles with architecture checkpoints and production robustness patterns.

item.title: Chapter 6: Review Pipeline
item.description: Three-stage code review pipeline covering automated validation, spec compliance checking, and code quality analysis with STRIDE threat modeling.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 6: Review Pipeline
item.itunes:summary: Three-stage code review pipeline covering automated validation, spec compliance checking, and code quality analysis with STRIDE threat modeling.

item.title: Chapter 7: Managing Tracks
item.description: Track lifecycle management including status markers, parallel tracks, blocked state handling, and git-aware rollback capabilities.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 7: Managing Tracks
item.itunes:summary: Track lifecycle management including status markers, parallel tracks, blocked state handling, and git-aware rollback capabilities.

item.title: Chapter 8: Decomposition
item.description: Breaking large features into independently shippable sub-tasks. Tree decomposition with dependency ordering and blast radius scoping.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 8: Decomposition
item.itunes:summary: Breaking large features into independently shippable sub-tasks. Tree decomposition with dependency ordering and blast radius scoping.

item.title: Chapter 9: Architecture Decision Records
item.description: Structured decision capture with context, rationale, consequences, and lifecycle management. How ADRs create an auditable trail of architectural choices.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 9: Architecture Decision Records
item.itunes:summary: Structured decision capture with context, rationale, consequences, and lifecycle management. How ADRs create an auditable trail of architectural choices.

item.title: Chapter 10: Context Tiering
item.description: How Draft organizes project context into three tiers -- always-loaded profiles, working memory, and deep storage -- modeled after CPU memory hierarchy.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 10: Context Tiering
item.itunes:summary: How Draft organizes project context into three tiers -- always-loaded profiles, working memory, and deep storage -- modeled after CPU memory hierarchy.

item.title: Chapter 11: The Agent System
item.description: Seven specialized agents -- Architect, Debugger, Ops, Planner, RCA, Reviewer, and Writer -- each with behavioral protocols tuned for their domain.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 11: The Agent System
item.itunes:summary: Seven specialized agents -- Architect, Debugger, Ops, Planner, RCA, Reviewer, and Writer -- each with behavioral protocols tuned for their domain.

item.title: Chapter 12: Signal Classification
item.description: How Draft classifies source files into 11 signal categories to determine which architecture sections get deep treatment, brief mention, or skip.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 12: Signal Classification
item.itunes:summary: How Draft classifies source files into 11 signal categories to determine which architecture sections get deep treatment, brief mention, or skip.

item.title: Chapter 13: Incremental Refresh
item.description: How Draft detects changes and updates only what has drifted. Covers freshness hashing, signal drift detection, and targeted regeneration.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 13: Incremental Refresh
item.itunes:summary: How Draft detects changes and updates only what has drifted. Covers freshness hashing, signal drift detection, and targeted regeneration.

item.title: Chapter 14: Deep Review
item.description: Production-grade deep review with ACID compliance audits. Checks atomicity, isolation, durability, idempotency, resilience, and observability.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 14: Deep Review
item.itunes:summary: Production-grade deep review with ACID compliance audits. Checks atomicity, isolation, durability, idempotency, resilience, and observability.

item.title: Chapter 15: Bug Hunt
item.description: 14-dimension bug hunting sweep covering null safety, concurrency, security, and algorithmic complexity. Only HIGH/CONFIRMED confidence findings are reported.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 15: Bug Hunt
item.itunes:summary: 14-dimension bug hunting sweep covering null safety, concurrency, security, and algorithmic complexity. Only HIGH/CONFIRMED confidence findings are reported.

item.title: Chapter 17: Pattern Learning
item.description: How Draft detects codebase patterns, records them to guardrails, and applies learned conventions to future work automatically.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 17: Pattern Learning
item.itunes:summary: How Draft detects codebase patterns, records them to guardrails, and applies learned conventions to future work automatically.

item.title: Chapter 18: Monorepo Federation
item.description: Context federation across monorepo services. Per-service draft directories with shared root context and service aggregation.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 18: Monorepo Federation
item.itunes:summary: Context federation across monorepo services. Per-service draft directories with shared root context and service aggregation.
